name: aigen Image Generation
summary: Generate images with the local aigen CLI through providers such as OpenRouter or OpenAI.

summaryI18n.en: Generate images with the local aigen CLI through providers such as OpenRouter or OpenAI.
summaryI18n.zh: 使用本地 aigen CLI 通过 OpenRouter 或 OpenAI 等 provider 生成图片。

description: Use this skill when the user wants AI-generated images through the local aigen CLI. The skill guides installation, provider/model setup, safe API key handling, readiness checks, image generation, and troubleshooting without treating aigen as a built-in NextClaw runtime.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when the user wants AI-generated images through the local aigen CLI. The skill guides installation, provider/model setup, safe API key handling, readiness checks, image generation, and troubleshooting without treating aigen as a built-in NextClaw runtime.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当用户希望通过本地 aigen CLI 生成 AI 图片时使用此技能。该技能会引导安装、provider/model 配置、安全 API key 写入、就绪检查、图片生成与故障排查，并明确 aigen 不是 NextClaw 内置运行时。

author: NextClaw
